meanings.definition: follow stealthily or recur constantly and spontaneously to
examples: the ghost of her mother haunted her

meanings.definition: be a regular or frequent visitor to a certain place
having or showing excessive or compulsive concern with something
examples: became more and more haunted by the stupid riddle
was absolutely obsessed with the girl
got no help from his wife who was preoccupied with the children
he was taken up in worry for the old woman
her expression became progressively more haunted

meanings.definition: inhabited by or as if by apparitions
